quests.title: Purification Chamber
quests.subtitle: Triple ore output. The x3 era begins.
description: The Purification Chamber injects Oxygen gas into Crushed Ore, converting it into Clumps — a step up from 2x toward 3x ore output.
Full x3 chain: Ore → Crusher (Crushed) → Purification Chamber (Clumps) → Crusher (Dirty Dust) → Chemical Washer (Dust) → Enricher (Dust) → Smelter (Ingot).
This machine requires Forge Energy and an Oxygen gas supply (from an Electrolytic Separator splitting water).
Important: The recipe has been modified to require the Mechanical Crafter with Brass Casings. No Brass-tier Create = no Purification Chamber.
Set up the Electrolytic Separator first — it splits water into Hydrogen and Oxygen, both useful.

quests.title: The x3 Ore Chain
quests.subtitle: Six machines, one ore block, three ingots.
description: The complete x3 processing chain requires these machines in sequence:
1. Crusher — Ore → Crushed Ore
2. Purification Chamber (O2) — Crushed Ore → Clumps
3. Crusher — Clumps → Dirty Dust
4. Chemical Washer (Water) — Dirty Dust → Dust
5. Enrichment Chamber — Dust → Dust (2x)
6. Energized Smelter — Dust → Ingot
Each machine needs FE and the appropriate gas supply. Use XNet to manage the fluid routing.
End result: 3 Iron Ingots from 1 Iron Ore block. The efficiency speaks for itself.

quests.title: Advanced Alloys
quests.subtitle: Atomic Alloy and Refined Obsidian. The good stuff.
description: Mekanism's endgame materials require a full alloy chain: Iron → Infused Alloy → Reinforced Alloy → Atomic Alloy.
Reinforced Alloy requires Diamonds in the infuser. Atomic Alloy requires Refined Obsidian.
Refined Obsidian: smelt Obsidian Dust (from Obsidian in the Crusher) → Refined Obsidian Ingot.
As armor, Refined Obsidian is nearly indestructible and provides massive protection.
Atomic Alloy is required for Tier 5 machines and the Fusion Reactor Controller. Stockpile both.

quests.title: ME Drive — Mass Storage
quests.subtitle: More drives. More cells. More stuff stored.
description: Your single ME Drive from Tier 3 won't cut it anymore. Time to scale up.
The ME Drive recipe has been upgraded to require the Mechanical Crafter with Brass Casings.
Build multiple drives and fill them with 256k or larger Storage Cells.
Pro tip: Use Storage Buses on Drawer Controllers to extend your AE2 storage into physical drawers — best of both worlds.

quests.title: MEGA Cells
quests.subtitle: 1,000,000 items. One cell. Perfectly normal.
description: MEGA Cells are the largest storage cells in the modpack — 1M, 4M, 16M, and 64M items per cell.
They require significant Certus Quartz and Fluix Crystal investment to craft, but the payoff is enormous.
A single 64M cell can hold your entire base's inventory with room to spare.
Combine with Applied Mekanistics (Tier 5) to store Mekanism chemicals in your AE2 network as well.

quests.title: Resource Catalyst
quests.subtitle: The gate to Mystical Agriculture Tier 3.
description: The Resource Catalyst is required to craft Tier 3 Mystical Agriculture seeds. There are three ways to get it:
Path 1 — Passive: 0.5% drop chance when mining ore veins with Create Ore Excavation drills.
Path 2 — Crafted: Build it in the Mechanical Crafter using MA Essences (Iron, Lapis, Quartz) + an Apotheosis gem.
Path 3 — Active: Guaranteed drop from Mowzie's Mobs bosses (Ferrous Wroughtnaut, Frostmaw, etc.) and dungeon chests (8% chance in When Dungeons Arise, YUNG's structures).
Collect at least 3 — one per Tier 3 seed recipe you want to unlock.

quests.title: Tier 3 Seeds
quests.subtitle: Diamonds. Growing. In the ground.
description: Tier 3 seeds produce Gold, Diamond, and Emerald Essences — the luxury materials.
Recipe change: each Tier 3 seed requires a Resource Catalyst as a crafting component.
No Catalyst = no T3 seeds. This prevents skipping the mid-game exploration and boss content.
Once you have Diamond Seeds running, your diamond supply becomes passive and infinite.
Plant them on Essence Farmland for a 10% growth speed bonus.

quests.title: Ars Nouveau: The Notebook
quests.subtitle: Magic exists. We just didn't mention it until now.
description: Ars Nouveau is this pack's magic system — spells, rituals, magical creatures, and automation.
The Worn Notebook is your introduction. Read it. All of it. It explains everything.
Source Gems are the magical fuel. You'll generate them via Agronomic Sourcelink (near crops) or Volcanic Sourcelink (near lava).
Key reason to invest: Drygmys. They're magical creatures that automatically generate mob drops — including Cataclysm boss drops.

quests.title: Drygmy Farm
quests.subtitle: Passive mob drops. Without killing the mobs.
description: Drygmys are magical creatures from Ars Nouveau that generate mob drops passively — no killing required.
Setup: place a Jars of Drygmy Whims in an Encountrium circle, summon Drygmys using a Drygmy Charm, and add Mob Jars (or Essences) nearby.
The Drygmys will periodically produce drops from any mob they recognize.
Using a Cataclysm Mob Effigy, they can be made to produce Cataclysm boss drops — including Mythic Catalysts.
This is the ONLY way to automate Mythic Catalyst production. It requires Cataclysm boss kills to get the Effigy first.

quests.title: Hyper Experience
quests.subtitle: Liquid XP. Industrial scale. Because why not.
description: Create: Enchantment Industry converts XP into liquid form, then processes it into Hyper Experience.
Hyper Experience is used in the Catalyst Altar — one of the three ways to craft a Resource Catalyst.
Setup: Collect XP via an Experience Rotor (mob farm nearby) → store in a tank → run through a Mixing recipe to produce Hyper Experience.
The Catalyst Altar consumes 1000 mB of Hyper Experience (via a Create Spout) to produce one Resource Catalyst.
This is the most controllable Catalyst source — fully automatable with a Create+Mekanism setup.

quests.title: Ready for Tier 5
quests.subtitle: The bosses are waiting. So is your funeral.
description: Tier 4 is done. You have x3 ore processing, massive AE2 storage, Drygmy automation, and Hyper XP production.
Tier 5 begins with combat. Cataclysm's boss line is the only source of Mythic Catalysts and Singularity Shards.
The Netherite Monstrosity is your entry point — found in the Nether, drops a guaranteed Resource Catalyst.
The Apex Bosses (Ignis, The Harbinger, Ender Guardian) drop Mythic Catalysts and Singularity Shards needed for the Fusion Reactor.
Before engaging: Refined Obsidian armor, Atomic Alloy-tier equipment, and full enchantments are strongly recommended.
Also make sure your AE2 autocrafting is running. You'll need to replenish supplies after each fight.
